signal_title: Italy's Draft Law on the Protection of Minors in the Digital Dimension
risk_rationale: The draft law in Italy proposes a restriction that conflicts with TikTok's current global baseline of allowing users aged 13 and above to access the platform. This creates a material compliance gap that requires immediate attention to align with the proposed age restriction and implement age verification mechanisms.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Minimum age: TikTok states service is for age 13+ (or higher where local law requires)
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Restrict access to social media for under 15
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The proposed Italian law requires restricting access to users under 15, which is stricter than TikTok's current policy of allowing users aged 13 and above.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Detection and prevention: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The draft law mandates age verification mechanisms, which may require more robust systems than TikTok's current machine learning and safety review processes.

remediations.title: Implement Age Restriction for Italy
remediations.description: Develop and deploy a system to restrict access to the platform for users under 15 in Italy, in compliance with the proposed law.
acceptance_criteria: Users under 15 in Italy cannot access the platform
System logs and reports age restriction compliance

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Integrate a robust age verification system that complies with the Italian draft law requirements, potentially using third-party verification services.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification system is operational and compliant with Italian law
Verification success rate meets regulatory standards

business_impact: The proposed law could limit the user base in Italy by raising the minimum age requirement, potentially reducing user growth and engagement metrics in the region.
recommended_actions: Engage with Italian regulators to discuss compliance timelines and technical feasibility
Assess potential partnerships with age verification service providers
Prepare communication plans for affected users in Italy
